mnemonics.title: Shared Memory Call Order
mnemonics.content: Get, Attach, Touch, Detach, Control. (GATDC) for shmget(), shmat(), use the memory, shmdt(), shmctl().

mnemonics.title: Semaphore Operations
mnemonics.content: P and V for Wait and Signal. Think 'P' for Probe (wait to acquire) and 'V' for Verhogen (Dutch for 'to raise' or signal). Alternatively, 'P' for Pass (wait until you can pass) and 'V' for Vacate (signal that you're vacating the resource).

mnemonics.title: Producer-Consumer Semaphore Initialization
mnemonics.content: M.E.F. - Mutex=1, Empty=BufferSize, Full=0. This sets the initial values for the three key semaphores.
